nonBlockingIssues.description: History trim test (line ~240) verifies length is capped at 365 and newest entry is present, but does not assert which specific oldest entry was trimmed. The core behavior is validated but the assertion could be more precise.

rejectedObservations.observation: Worker added `jest: 'readonly'` to ESLint globals in eslint.config.js to fix lint errors from jest.mock() calls in test files. AGENTS.md mentions using jest.mock() but didn't document that ESLint needed the jest global configured for test files.
rejectedObservations.detail: The fix was already applied by the worker during feature implementation (commit b945bdd). The eslint.config.js already contains the jest global. No further action needed.
